issues: Outliers detected in: Age(days) (30), Weight(Kg) (4), Height(cm) (15), Birth Weight(Kg) (3), Multiple Baby (10), Pregnancy Duration(month) (34), Breastfeeding Duration(days) (20), Duration of Diarea (Day) (35).
Classes are imbalanced: Normal=187, Mild Malnutrition=59, SAM=43, MAM=23.

fixes.problem: Unused columns present: Middle Upper Arm Circumference(cm)
fixes.applied: Dropped columns not used by the model.

fixes.problem: Missing numbers in: Weight(Kg), Height(cm), Birth Weight(Kg), Breastfeeding Duration(days), Duration of Diarea (Day), Pregnancy Duration(month).
fixes.applied: Filled with the column median (robust to outliers).

fixes.problem: Missing categories in: Odema, Birth Complication, Appetite, Chronic Disease, immunisation.
fixes.applied: Filled with the most frequent category.

fixes.problem: Extreme values that can distort the model.
fixes.applied: Capped (winsorised) to the IQR range during training.

fixes.problem: Some malnutrition classes are rarer than others.
fixes.applied: Balanced with SMOTE oversampling during training.
